# Assassin
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Assassin&prop=wikitext

{{Classbox
| desc = The assassin fights from medium range and uses poison to damage his enemies over time.
| weaponSlot = Dagger
| weapon = Steel Dagger
| abilitySlot = Poison
| ability = Centipede Poison
| armor = LeatherArmor
| armorLink = Leather Armors

| hpStart = 150
| hpLevel = 20 - 30
| hpCap = 720

| mpStart = 100
| mpLevel = 2 - 8
| mpCap = 252

| attStart = 12
| attLevel = 0 - 2
| attCap = 60

| defStart = 0
| defLevel = 0
| defCap = 25

| spdStart = 15
| spdLevel = 1 - 2
| spdCap = 75

| dexStart = 15
| dexLevel = 1 - 2
| dexCap = 75

| vitStart = 15
| vitLevel = 0 - 1
| vitCap = 40

| wisStart = 10
| wisLevel = 1 - 2
| wisCap = 60
}}
